description: Lists in Judaeo-Arabic on recto and verso. Medieval-era. One of the entries on the recto lists the weight of a specific good. The list on the verso consists of varied quantities of gold dinar (perhaps as a descending calculation of addition or subtraction). Requires further examination.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
